workflow.name: Create an Interactive Door Blueprint
workflow.description: Build a door actor that opens and closes when the player overlaps a trigger volume, using Timeline-driven rotation in the Blueprint Event Graph.
prerequisites: An open UE project with a level

steps.purpose: Spawn an Empty Actor to serve as the door root
Add a StaticMeshComponent for the door mesh
Add a BoxCollision component as the trigger volume
Set collision preset to OverlapAllDynamic on the trigger
Convert to a Blueprint Class for adding logic
Add a Timeline node for smooth door rotation
Wire overlap event to Timeline Play input
Add SetRelativeRotation node driven by Timeline output
Connect Timeline float output to rotation Z axis
Compile the Blueprint to verify it works

workflow.expectedOutcome: A reusable door Blueprint that smoothly opens when the player enters the trigger volume and closes when they leave

readme: This workflow creates a classic interactive door. After importing, customize the door mesh, rotation angle (default 90°), and Timeline duration to match your game's style.
